name: Siemens SIMATIC S7-1200 PLC
description: Compact programmable logic controller for small to medium automation tasks. Features integrated PROFINET interface, onboard I/O, and support for IEC 61131-3 programming languages. Ideal for machine control, process automation, and motion control applications.

name: ABB ACS880 Variable Speed Drive 11kW
description: Industrial all-compatible drive for demanding applications. Built-in safety functions (STO, SS1), adaptive programming, and direct torque control for precise motor management across heavy industries.

name: Schneider Masterpact NW 800A MCCB
description: Air circuit breaker for LV power distribution. Provides overload, short-circuit, and earth fault protection. Micrologic trip unit with advanced metering and communication via Modbus.

name: Omron CJ2M CPU31 PLC Module
description: High-performance modular PLC CPU with EtherNet/IP port. Suited for high-speed counting, motion control, and complex process logic. Scalable I/O architecture.

name: Eaton xEnergy HVL Load-Break Switch 630A
description: HV load-break switch for medium voltage switchgear panels. Designed for reliable switching of HV lines up to 36 kV. Compact design for space-saving MV distribution boards.

name: Sick S300 Safety Laser Scanner
description: Compact safety laser scanner for machine guarding and AGV navigation. Protective field up to 3 m, warning field up to 50 m. OSSD outputs, PROFINET interface.

name: Keyence LR-ZB250CN Photoelectric Sensor
description: Long-range CMOS laser sensor with BGS (Background Suppression). Detects objects at up to 250 cm. NPN/PNP selectable output. Stainless steel housing for harsh environments.

name: Rockwell Allen-Bradley PowerFlex 525 VFD 7.5kW
description: Compact AC drive with EtherNet/IP connectivity. Dual-port EtherNet/IP allows daisy-chain topology. Built-in EMC filter. Suitable for HVAC, pumps, conveyors.

name: Rittal TS 8 Baying Enclosure 600x2000x600
description: Heavy-duty steel control panel enclosure. Baying system allows expansion. IP55 protection, continuous cable entry zones, and full gland plate. Ideal for MCC and control panel builds.

name: Fluke 435-II Power Quality Analyser
description: Three-phase power quality and energy analyser. Measures power, harmonics, flicker, unbalance, and transients. 500 Hz bandwidth. Ideal for troubleshooting and energy audits.

name: Pilz PNOZ X3 Safety Relay
description: Safety relay module for E-stop, safety gate, and light curtain monitoring. 3 safety contacts + 1 auxiliary. Suitable up to PL e / Cat.4.

name: Belden 3107A Industrial Ethernet Cable (300m)
description: Industrial Shielded Cat6A Ethernet cable for harsh environments. Oil-resistant PVC jacket, drag-chain rated, 600V rating. 300m drum.

name: Mitsubishi MELSEC iQ-R Series PLC R08CPU
description: High-speed modular PLC with nanosecond-level processing. Supports motion control, safety, C language, and multiple field networks. Ideal for automotive and semiconductor manufacturing.

name: Endress+Hauser Promag P 300 Flow Meter
description: Electromagnetic flow meter for conductive liquids. High accuracy ±0.4%. Hart 7, PROFIBUS PA, Modbus interfaces. Suitable for water treatment, chemicals, and food processes.

name: ABB S804PV-S125 DC Circuit Breaker 125A
description: DC circuit breaker for solar PV and battery storage systems. Suitable for 1000 V DC systems. UL489B listed. Two-pole, snap-on DIN rail mount.

name: Balluff BTL7-E500-M0400 Linear Position Sensor
description: Magnetostrictive linear position transducer for hydraulic cylinders and linear stages. Non-contact, wear-free measurement. Resolution 1 µm. SSI/Analog/IO-Link output.

name: CX Series 4.3" HMI in Build PLC
description: Compact HMI with integrated PLC functionality. Features 4.3" TFT LCD display, RS-485 communication, 12/12 I/O points. Panel mount design ideal for machine interfaces and small automation systems.

name: 10" HMI in Built PLC
description: Large 10-inch HMI with integrated PLC. High resolution 1024x768 touch screen display. Panel mount design suitable for complex automation interfaces and SCADA-like applications.

name: 4.3 Inch PLC HMI Combo Unit
description: Combined PLC and HMI unit with 4.3-inch capacitive touch screen. 65K display colors, RS485 port, 24V operation. Compact 164x129x43 mm design for space-constrained installations.

name: Single Dual Channel Data Logger
description: Versatile 2/4/6/8 channel data logger with RTD/PT-100 input. Dual display shows process value and channel number. 4GB SD card logging with 1-999 min log rate. 0.5% accuracy, 0-400C range.

name: Paperless Data Logger SPR-600
description: Full-featured paperless data logger with 4.3" TFT display. Universal input support, 6/12/18 channels. Flash memory and USB pen drive support. RS-485, printer, and SD card output options.

name: Universal Digital Timer UT-4821
description: Multi-function universal digital timer with dual display. Selectable modes: Laundry/Cycle/Preset/On-delay. 2 setpoint relay outputs. Programmable up/down counting with memory option.

name: Digital Sequential Timer SST-968
description: 4-channel and 8-channel digital sequential timer for starter/control panel applications. ABS plastic body, panel mounting. Suitable for textile, process industry, and offset printing machinery.

name: Digital Thumbwheel Timer STW
description: Panel mount thumbwheel timer with on-delay operation. 1-99 min time range, 2 C/O output contacts. Available in 96x96, 72x72, 48x48, 48x96 sizes. Rust-resistant ABS plastic body.

name: Universal Timer Single Display UT-481
description: 3-digit single display universal timer with preset and cyclic modes. Wide time range 0.1 sec to 999 Hr. NPN/PNP proximity and micro switch input. Front/back reset selectable.

name: Digital Thumbwheel Timer Multi-Function STW-U
description: Multi-function digital timer with thumbwheel setting. 3/4/5 digit display with timing capacity up to 999 hours. Available in all standard sizes. Rust-resistant, smooth finish.

name: BOD Incubators Temperature Controller
description: Programmable BOD controller with PID control and RTD input. SSR output with heating + cooling. Compact 24x48 mm size designed for laboratory incubators and scientific instruments.

name: Digital Temperature Indicator STI-491
description: 4-digit single display temperature indicator with thermocouple and RTD input. +/-0.5% accuracy, 0.1C resolution for PT-100. Available in 96x96, 72x72, 48x96, 48x48 sizes.

specs.Resolution: 0.1 C for PT-100, 1 C for T/C

name: Digital Count Totalizer DCT-961
description: 6-digit digital count totalizer with proximity/NPN/PNP sensor input. High-speed counting with non-volatile memory. Front/back reset. Available in 95x95, 72x72, 48x96 sizes.

name: Digital Count Totaliser DCT-491
description: 6-digit single display RED LED counter/totalizer. NPN/PNP/photocell/encoder input. Non-volatile memory with 0.01% accuracy. Available in multiple panel sizes.

name: Digital Preset Counters PC-961
description: 4-digit dual display preset counter with proximity/photocell/encoder input. Up/down counting with auto/manual reset. 0-300 Hz frequency, 1 relay output.

name: Digital Batch Counter BC-961
description: 6+4 digit dual display batch counter with relay/buzzer output. Upper display shows count, lower shows RPM. NPN/PNP sensor input. Suitable for packaging, plastic, pharmaceutical industries.

name: Digital Length Counter LC-961
description: Dual display 6D (upper) 4D (lower) length counter with diameter entry scale factor. Proximity/photocell/encoder input. Relay/buzzer output for length measurement applications.

name: Digital Counter Meter STW-C
description: 3/4/5 digit thumbwheel counter meter with non-volatile memory. Proximity, photocell, encoder, or potential free contact input. Available in all standard panel sizes.

specs.Sensor: Proximity, photocell, encoder, potential free contact

name: Digital Tablet Counters TBC-961
description: 8-digit total tablet counter with 4-digit rate display. Rotary station selection. Developed specifically for pharmaceutical industry tablet counting applications.

name: Jumbo Display Indicator PI-4041
description: Jumbo display counter with 4-inch digit height. Red LED display, temperature/RH/analog input. Wall mount, RS485 communication. 4/5 digit double display for industrial counting.

name: Jumbo Process Indicator PI-4042-2
description: 4-inch jumbo display process indicator with 4-20mA input. Wall mounting with metal powder-coated enclosure. Relay output, -50C to 2300C range. Suitable for temperature, humidity, load cell indication.

name: Jumbo Display Indicator PI-4042
description: 4-inch height red seven segment jumbo display with 2-inch single display. TC/RTD, proximity/photocell, or 4-20mA/0-10VDC input. Sheet metal fabricated powder-coated enclosure.

specs.Display: 4 inch height, Red Seven Segment (5D 2 inch single display)

name: Jumbo Display Indicator PI-2051
description: PID/On-Off jumbo temperature controller with 2-inch display. Thermocouple input, -50 to 2300C range. Sheet metal powder-coated body. Weight/load/temperature/process indication.

name: Three Phase Digital Energy Meter EM-96
description: CT operated digital energy meter with kWh/kVArh function. 3x230/400V rating, 5A CT. 96x96 panel mount design. Perfect for industrial panel making systems.

name: Digital Power Meter PM-96
description: LED display digital power meter for industrial applications. 96x96 ABS plastic body. Measures power parameters for panel monitoring and energy management.

name: Swastik MFM Meter MFM-96
description: True multi-function meter combining energy meter, KW meter, and power meter in one unit. 96x96 LED display, 285V AC. Ideal for comprehensive electrical parameter monitoring.

name: Digital AVF Meter AVF-961
description: Ampere-Volt-Frequency meter with 3-phase measurement. CT ratio selectable up to 999A AC. True RMS indication with P-P, P-N display. Adjustable scroll time.

specs.Input: CT Ratio Selectable up to 999 A AC

name: Digital Panel AC Ampere Meter DPM-961
description: 4-digit single display AC ampere meter. Input range 0-1000/5A CT selectable. Measures 20-650VAC, 5A/20A AC. Available in 48x48, 48x96, 72x72, 96x96 sizes.

name: Three Phase Volt Meter DPM-961-V-3P
description: 3-phase 4-wire digital volt meter with bright 3-digit 3-row LED display. 0-500V range. 96x96 mm panel mount for industrial panel and motor control applications.

specs.Display Type: Digital bright 3 Digit 3 Row LED display
specs.Voltage: 415 V AC phase to phase / single phase

name: Digital Panel DC Volt Meter DPM-491-V-DC
description: 4-digit single display DC voltmeter with programmable range 0-500.0V DC. +/-0.5% accuracy. Compact 48x96 size for industrial DC voltage monitoring.

name: Digital Panel Voltmeter DPM-721-V-AC
description: Low operational cost AC voltmeter with accurate measurements. 4-digit single display, 0-500.0VAC range. User-friendly interface for industrial voltage monitoring.

name: Swastik AVF Meter 4 Digit AVF-961-4D
description: 4-digit bright LED AVF meter measuring voltage, frequency, current, load hour, and RPM. Programmable CT ratio. Three-phase panel mount for electrical industries.

specs.Features: Voltage, current, Load hour, CT ratio, RPM

name: GT8-D PID/On-Off Temperature Controller
description: GT8 series dual display temperature controller with PID mode for both heating and cooling. 72x72 mm size, RTD/current/voltage/thermocouple input. Avoids temperature fluctuation with intelligent PID cooling control.

name: GR-818-A PID Temperature Controller with Current Measure
description: Advanced PID controller with running current measurement up to 100A. 4-digit dual display, RS-485 Modbus communication. High/low/high-low alarm on heater current. Knob setting, 300ms sampling.

name: GR818F Series Thyristor Power Control with PID
description: Single/three phase thyristor output power controller with PID. Phase angle output, star/delta connection. Soft start function, RS-485 Modbus. 10 programs with 12 steps for profile control.

name: AK6-AKL-800 ARC Extinction PID Controller
description: ARC technology PID controller designed for food machines, packaging machines, and heat press machines. High performance with direct load up to 2000W. 72x72 mm, RTD/thermocouple input.

name: AK6-A Smart PID/On-Off Temperature Controller
description: Smart range temperature controller with 6-digit dual display (white/red). Relay & SSR output. -200 to 2300C range. CE certified. 48x48 mm compact size.

name: GT8-A PID Temperature Controller
description: GT8 series PID temperature controller with 4-digit dual display (upper red, lower green). Two-way PID action for heating and cooling. SMPS supply, CE/ISO certified. 48x48 mm.

name: AK3-A PID/On-Off Temperature Controller
description: Economic range single display PID controller. J/K/E/RTD input, relay or SSR output. PID or On-Off selectable. 48x48 mm, available in all standard sizes. 180-240V AC supply.

name: AK6-800 ARC Extinction Digital PID Controller
description: ARC technology PID controller specially designed for packaging industry. Dual display with 8A relay output. Direct heater load up to 2000W. K,E,J,N/PT-100 sensor input.

name: GT8-E PID/On-Off Temperature Controller
description: GT8 series 96x96 mm temperature controller with 3 relay outputs. RS485 communication. PID control for both heating and cooling. Thermocouple/current/voltage/RTD input.

name: GT8-B PID/On-Off Temperature Controller
description: GT8 series 48x96 mm PID temperature controller. Current/voltage/RTD/thermocouple input. Relay/SSR output. Intelligent PID cooling control to avoid temperature fluctuation.

name: Programmable Logic Controllers HPC-12P8R
description: Cautoni PLC with 20/28 I/O points. 32-bit processor, dual-line programmable LCD display. RS-485 programming port. Ladder programming with DIN rail mounting. 24VDC supply.

name: HMI Inbuilt PLC 4.3 Inch DW-4G-M8Q8-CS
description: HMI with integrated PLC combo unit. 4.3-inch capacitive touch, 480x272 resolution, 65535 true colors. 12 digital outputs, RS485, USB, SD card slot. IP65 rated.

name: HMI Inbuilt PLC 7 Inch DW-7S-M8-Q8-CS
description: 7-inch HMI with inbuilt PLC. 800x480 resolution, capacitive touch. 20 digital outputs, RS-485, SD card slot. Ladder/easy HMI programming. Mix input and output combinations available.

name: Micro PLC with Display MPC-M8-R8-CS
description: Micro PLC with 16/24 DIO, 32-bit processor, dual-line LCD display. Ladder programming via RS-485. 512K flash memory, <0.01us instruction time. DIN rail mount, 24VDC. 1.2KVA opto isolation.

name: Process Control Instrument SPC-961
description: Process control instrument with 0-10VDC/0-20mA/4-20mA input. 2 relay outputs, 24V DC transmitter supply, 4-20mA re-transmission. IP68 rated, 0.9% FS accuracy.

name: Profile Temperature Controller GR818P-AT-120
description: 32-step profile temperature controller with two-way PID. 4-digit dual display (upper red, lower green). RS-485 Modbus, 2-3 relay/analog output. -200 to 2300C range.

name: SCR Power Regulator TR-SCR
description: Three phase SCR power regulator with phase angle control. 4-20mA input, dual display for input percentage and power limit. Soft start, current limit, manual percentage output. Natural/forced cooling.

specs.Cooling: Natural & Forced Cooling as per load capacity

name: Thyristor Trigger Modules TRK-1
description: Three phase thyristor trigger module with 4-digit single display. Analog input (0-5V, 0-10V, 0-20mA, 4-20mA). No external sync line required. Auto recognizes single/two/three phase output.

name: Digital Temperature Controller TC-4821-P
description: Economic range TC series double display temperature controller with PID mode. TC/RTD input, relay/SSR output. For ovens, lab equipment, and scientific industry. CE certified.

name: PID Temperature Controller AK3-D
description: Cautoni Swastik AK3-D economic range PID controller (single display). PID On/Off control, flush mounting, 72x72 mm. RTD/thermocouple input, relay output.

name: PID/On-Off Temperature Controller AK6-B
description: Cautoni-Swastik AK6 series smart temperature controller, dual display in white or red colour. Relay & SSR output, 48x96 mm. 90-270VAC/DC supply.

name: Digital Temperature Controller Knob Setting STC-9611
description: Swastik STC-9611 knob setting controller. On/Off control, 96x96 mm display. Thermocouple/RTD input, relay output. 220-240V supply.

name: Digital Temperature Controller Push to Set STC-961
description: Push to set temperature controller with PID/On-Off control. 4-digit single display, -50 to 200C range. Non-interrupted functionality, accuracy, enhanced service life.

name: Digital Temperature Controller DTC-961
description: Swastik DTC-961 digital temperature controller. On/Off control, relay output. Thermocouple/RTD input. Operational fluency, consistent performance, high efficiency.

name: PID Temperature Controller GT8
description: Universal temperature controller with PID/On-Off control. 4+4 digit display, 48x48 mm flush mounting. T/C: K,E,J,S,B,N,R,T and RTD: PT-100/3wire input. 0.5% FS accuracy.

name: Temperature Scanner 8 Channel SCN-1908
description: 8-channel temperature scanner with dual seven segment red display. J/K/RTD sensor input, 0.1% accuracy. Optional relay/RS-232/RS-485/printer output. Metallic enclosure, 96x192 mm.

specs.Resolution: 2 C for thermocouple, 0.1 C for RTD

name: Digital Temperature Scanner SCN-968
description: Digital temperature scanner with 2 relay high/low alarm output. Optional RS-485 communication. Black metallic body, 96x96 mm size. For oven/heater industry applications.

name: Digital Process Indicator PIC-481
description: 4-digit single display process indicator with 4-20mA/0-20mA/0-10VDC input. Selectable resolution, -1999 to 9999 range. 24V DC transmitter supply. Available in all standard sizes.
